name: Dave Dave Dave
short_description: Dave Dave Dave, is a retro style hardcore platforming game set in an unknown world for you to explore with a single goal, reaching freedom.
detailed_description:
Dave Dave Dave tries to combine Metroidvania with a Platformer, the path is non linier and you most likely will find yourself lost.
There is no map so you will have to rely on you memory.
A world filled with hidden (and not so hidden) diamonds you have to collect, are you up for the challenge?



Game Features:

  • a large world to explore
  • minimalistic retro graphics
  • simple controls
  • no easy mode
  • hidden secrets
  • built in timer with death counter
  • lots of death in the process
  • modding support with godot
